'''5th Fleet Security''', also known as '''Fifth Fleet Security''',<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" /> was a [[Division/Legends|division]]<ref name="RotS Hasbro" /> of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that was assigned to serve as a [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security force]] aboard the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic fleet's]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]] during<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" /> the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref>

During the war, 5th Fleet Security [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] wielded the<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" /> [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]] [[blaster carbine]],<ref name="RotS Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> and wore<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" /> [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]]<ref name="RotS Visual Dictionary" /> that could be fitted with an antenna on the back. Their [[Armor/Legends|armor]] had several [[Color/Legends|navy blue]] markings,<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" /> which designated their affiliation with the division.<ref name="RotS Hasbro" /> The armor included a set of two navy blue stripes on the [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]], [[Breast/Legends|breastplate]], left [[Limb/Legends|shoulder]], right forearm, and on the armor's left thigh and right knee. The armor's [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]] and its [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]] plates also had navy blue markings.<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" />

==Behind the scenes==
The design for 5th Fleet Security clone troopers originated as concept art for the film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']],<ref name="Making of RotS">''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]''</ref> which was released on [[May 19]], [[2005]].<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''</ref> It was created by [[Alex Jaeger]] as part of a series of concept art pieces depicting different [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commanders]] designed for different theaters of war. The design was showcased in ''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]'',<ref name="Making of RotS" /> a reference book written by [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] and published<ref name="Del Rey BTS">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iii/release/publishing/news20041124.html|text=Planning Your Episode III Bookshelf}}</ref> on [[April 2]], 2005.<ref name="SWA">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iii/release/publishing/news20040719.html|text=Del Rey Goes Behind the Scenes of Episode III}}</ref>

Alex Jaeger's concept art was later used for an action figure in [[Hasbro]]'s 2005 [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (toy line)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' toy line]], although the division was not given a name.<ref name="RotS Hasbro" /> 5th Fleet Security was later identified as part of a [[2006]] action figure in Hasbro's ''[[Star Wars: The Saga Collection]]'' line of toys.<ref name="5th Fleet Hasbro" />
